summary: Pinterest Visual Marketing Engine fully tested — backend (22 unit + 12 live API tests all pass) and frontend (queue page + SEO card both render correctly and integrate with backend). All 15 features in the review request work as specified.
critical_code_review_comments: Pre-existing, unrelated: A 'Production Outage Alert — 5 endpoints reporting failures' banner is visible across admin pages. This is NOT caused by Pinterest routes (all Pinterest endpoints return 200). Main agent should verify which 5 endpoints are actually failing if not already aware — could be stale monitor data.

routes/pinterest_visual.py uses role check allowing 'admin', 'super_admin' AND 'manager'; review request said 'admin only'. If manager should be excluded, tighten _require_admin. Not blocking since admin accounts work.

DELETE /blocklist/{image_url_b64} correctly handles base64url, returns 404 for malformed input (caught by _unblock's not-found path). One small gotcha: `!!!notbase64!!!` returned 404 instead of 400 because urlsafe_b64decode silently decoded to non-ASCII bytes that .decode() may or may not throw on — not user-facing, acceptable.
seed_data_creation: Tests generated ~15-20 TEST_ prefixed pending candidates via POST /queue/generate; these remain in DB but are harmless (status=pending/approved/skipped/blocked). The generate-on-demand call is idempotent and bounded by target_count≤50.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pinterest Visual Engine is stable. All 9 boards seed correctly (pinterest_boards collection), pin_candidates flow approve/skip/block/edit all work, PATCH validation (max-length 100/500/200) works, blocklist base64url encoding works. Pinterest API not connected — drip dispatch returns {dispatched:0, reason:'integration_not_connected'} (correct). The /admin/seo card lives below 'Web Push Notifications' and above 'Pinterest Auto-Pin', heading is 'Pinterest Visual Marketing Engine'.
verified_endpoints: PATCH /api/admin/pinterest/visual/boards/{slug} — 200 toggles auto_approve/description, 404 for unknown slug, ignores unknown fields silently
POST /api/admin/pinterest/visual/queue/generate — generated 12, auto_approved 9 when Whole-Home auto_approve=true
POST /queue/{id}/approve — 200 sets status=approved + scheduled_for; second call 404 (not pending)
PATCH /queue/{id} — 200 edits title/desc, 422 on over-length, 400 on empty body
DELETE /blocklist/{b64} — works with base64url, 404 for bad input
verified_ui: /admin/pinterest-queue: 5-stat strip (Pending 2 / Approved·Queued 26 / Posted 0 / Skipped·Blocked 2 / Last Generation 04 May)
3 tabs rendering: Pin Queue | Boards Config | Blocked Images
Pin cards show PRODUCT CUTOUT + PENDING badges, image, board tag, title, description, action buttons
Boards Config tab lists all 9 boards with 18 toggles (auto_approve + is_active per board)
/admin/seo: PinterestVisualEngineCard renders below WebPushAdminCard, shows Pending/Approved-Queued/Posted-Live, 'Manage' button, clicking card navigates to /admin/pinterest-queue
